personal.aboutMe: I am a passionate Computer Science graduate from Narula Institute of Technology (MAKAUT) with a strong CGPA of 9.11. I aim to build a long-term career in a field with opportunities for growth and leadership. I aspire to utilize my technical skills to enhance the organization. I am dedicated to working diligently to meet my goals and deliver top-notch performance. I am enthusiastic about applying my innovative abilities and expertise to successfully complete projects. My experience spans machine learning, data analysis, and software development.

projects.title: Online Payment Fraud Detection
projects.description: Developed a comprehensive machine learning model to detect fraudulent online payment transactions. The system analyzes transaction patterns, user behavior, and payment characteristics to identify potentially fraudulent activities in real-time. Implemented multiple classification algorithms including Random Forest, Logistic Regression, and XGBoost to achieve high accuracy in fraud prediction.
features: Real-time fraud detection using ML algorithms
Data preprocessing and handling imbalanced datasets
Performance evaluation with precision, recall, and F1-score
projects.tools: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Google Colab

projects.title: Rock and Mine Detection
projects.description: Built a sonar data classification system using machine learning to distinguish between rocks and mines based on sonar signal returns. The project involved processing 60 frequency band features from sonar signals and applying supervised learning techniques to accurately classify underwater objects.
features: Sonar signal data preprocessing and analysis
Binary classification using Logistic Regression & SVM
Visualization of signal patterns and decision boundaries
projects.tools: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib, Google Colab

achievements.title: Research Paper Publication
achievements.description: Published a paper in Indian Journal of Natural Science on modification of PVC. ISSN: 0976-0997. The research explored innovative approaches to modify PVC properties using poly alkyl acrylate mixtures.

achievements.title: Best Presenter Award
achievements.description: Received the Best Presenter Award for the research topic 'Effect of Poly Alkyl Acrylate Mixture on PVC for Property Modification' at an academic conference.

achievements.title: Machine Learning Internship Certificate
achievements.description: Successfully completed a Certificate of Training and Internship in Machine Learning (Python) at Ardent Computech Pvt. Ltd., gaining hands-on experience with real-world ML projects.
